prompt: A collage of black and white photographs of famous cities layered creatively on a gradient blue background, giving a sense of nostalgia and travel.
prompt_refined: A multi-layered collage featuring vintage-style black and white photographs of iconic landmarks from famous cities. The photographs are organically overlapped, with varied sizes and subtle rotations, creating a dynamic, artistic arrangement reminiscent of an old travel scrapbook. This entire composition rests on a vertical gradient blue background, transitioning smoothly from a light sky blue at the top to a deeper azure at the bottom. The overall scene should evoke a profound sense of nostalgia and the spirit of travel.
objects: Photographs featuring iconic landmarks from famous cities
Background transitioning from light sky blue at the top
Background transitioning to a deeper azure at the bottom
Arrangement reminiscent of an old travel scrapbook
